commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed for the new local workflow, checkout, auth, and automation surface; no narrow automated repair is identified.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the PR adds no dependencies and scopes preserved Codex auth to local-only review. (sha=1c872e6453343ead2c1070516c3f4196dce40641)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `review -- --local-only`, a local Codex preflight script, scoped local Codex auth preservation, managed exact-item PR checkouts, Windows Codex launcher handling, README/skill docs, a repo-local Codex skill, CI coverage, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new local maintainer workflow rather than fixing a broken existing contract. The observable check is the terminal proof for `pnpm run codex:local:check` and `pnpm run review -- --local-only`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed for the new local workflow, checkout, auth, and automation surface; no narrow automated repair is identified.

target.title: [codex] Add local ClawSweeper review workflow
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a local ClawSweeper review workflow for users who want advisory output before submitting, updating, or re-reviewing an issue or pull request. This was based on a discussion with @joshavant on Discord.

## Changes

- Add `pnpm run review -- --local-only` for read-only local issue/PR review without the starter GitHub comment.
- Add `pnpm run codex:local:check` to verify local Codex CLI auth and execution without printing secrets.
- Preserve local Codex auth only for `--local-only`; hosted/normal workers still strip Codex/OpenAI/GitHub write credentials.
- Prefer the Windows Codex app binary for local-only review and support Node-shebang Codex shims on Windows.
- Keep README as the canonical local review guide with generic `--target-repo owner/name` examples.
- Add `docs/local-clawsweeper-skill.md` for the optional Codex skill and remove the duplicated long-form local review guide.
- Add `.agents/skills/local-clawsweeper-review` as an optional ergonomic Codex wrapper.

## Validation

- Final-head full repo check on `1c872e6453343ead2c1070516c3f4196dce40641`:

```text
pnpm run check

Passed: build, lint, unit tests, repair tests, changed coverage, full coverage, and format check.
```

- Final-head Codex preflight on `1c872e6453343ead2c1070516c3f4196dce40641`:

```text
pnpm run codex:local:check

Codex binary: codex
Checking Codex login status...
Checking Codex login status completed in 0.1s.
Running Codex smoke test with gpt-5.5...
Running Codex smoke test with gpt-5.5 completed in 32.5s.
Codex local preflight passed.
```

- Final-head local review proof on `1c872e6453343ead2c1070516c3f4196dce40641`:

```text
pnpm run review -- --local-only --target-repo openclaw/clawsweeper --item-number 357 --artifact-dir artifacts/local-review-357-docs-consolidation-proof

Local ClawSweeper review for openclaw/clawsweeper#357

Preparing target checkout
  mode: managed PR checkout
  path: artifacts/local-review-357-docs-consolidation-proof/target
  base: main

Loading review item
  item: PR #357
  title: [codex] Add local ClawSweeper review workflow
  state: open

Collecting GitHub context

Running Codex review
  timeout: 20m 0s
  stdout: artifacts/local-review-357-docs-consolidation-proof/codex/357.1.codex.stdout.log
  stderr: artifacts/local-review-357-docs-consolidation-proof/codex/357.1.codex.stderr.log

Review complete
  elapsed: 4m 12s
  decision: keep_open
  confidence: high
  action: kept_open
  report: artifacts/local-review-357-docs-consolidation-proof/357.md
```

Local review artifact summary:

- `review_status=complete`
- `decision=keep_open`
- `confidence=high`
- `action_taken=kept_open`
- `review_service_tier=fast`
- `local_checkout_access=verified`
- `main_sha=bd03fe34c0a49e17735186bc15e6e8656d03e2e2`
- `pull_head_sha=1c872e6453343ead2c1070516c3f4196dce40641`
- Managed target checkout remained clean after the run: `## clawsweeper/pr-357`

No GitHub apply/close command was run; this was local-only advisory review proof.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: joshavant
